_comment: What the /meeting Claude skill produces after reading a transcript. The meeting note itself is written by the skill directly and is not gated: it is a reversible local file, and writing it is what makes the extraction checkable. Its path rides on every item so a reviewer can open the source of a claim instead of trusting the extraction.

items.title: Middle tier stays usage-based, revisit after two enterprise calls
items.detail: Priya argued the seat-based version is easier to sell and harder to defend. Agreed to keep usage-based and test it on the next two enterprise conversations before committing.
items.evidence: Discussed at length around the slide 8-11 walkthrough.

items.title: Rewrite slides 8-11 so the usage cut reads as deliberate
items.detail: The current version reads clean internally and arbitrary to a buyer who was not in these conversations.

items.title: Finance pushing 15% annual discount without a stated reason
items.detail: The 20% figure has never been defended in writing. Worth settling the rationale before it gets negotiated down by default.
